nasb.text: Although a sinner does evil a hundred times and may lengthen his life, still I know that it will be well for those who fear God, who fear Him openly.

esv.text: Though a sinner does evil a hundred times and prolongs his life, yet I know that it will be well with those who fear God, because they fear before him.

cnv.text: 罪人既然作惡百次，還享長壽，那麼我知道敬畏　神的人，就是在他面前存敬畏的心的，必享福樂。

ccb.text: 虽然罪人作恶多端仍得长寿，我却认为敬畏上帝的人必亨通。

csbs.text: 即使罪人作恶百次仍享长寿，然而我知道，敬畏神的人日子美好，因他们在神面前心存敬畏；
